meta.title: Atelier Brahim — Master Upholsterer & Bespoke Décor
meta.description: High-end upholstery craftsman. Bedding, sofas, armchairs and complete bespoke living-room décor. Free quote.

hero.title:
The art of elevating
your interiors
hero.subtitle: Bedding, sofas, armchairs and complete living-room décor. Every piece is handcrafted, built to last and tailored to you.

intro.title: Exceptional craft, a signature of your own
intro.text: From our workshop, we turn noble materials and precise gestures into exceptional pieces. We don't sell mass-produced goods: we create bespoke work, designed with you, for your space and your lifestyle.

products.title: Pieces crafted by type
products.subtitle: Explore our worlds. Each category is made to measure — dimensions, fabrics, finishes and comfort to your taste.

literie.title: Bedding
literie.text: Upholstered headboards, dressed bases and bespoke sets for exceptional nights.

canapes.title: Sofas
canapes.text: Corner, modular or classic sofas — sturdy frame, comfortable seating, fabrics of your choice.

fauteuils.title: Armchairs
fauteuils.text: Restoration of antique armchairs or contemporary creations, for a bold character.

services.title: Complete décor for your spaces
services.subtitle: Beyond furniture, we design entire atmospheres. We orchestrate every detail to create a place that is truly yours.

led.title: LED & Lighting integration
led.text: Ambient lighting, backlighting and integrated light effects to enhance your spaces.

agencement.title: Furniture arrangement
agencement.text: Optimising and arranging your furniture for a harmonious, fluid and functional space.

ambiance.title: Atmosphere design
ambiance.text: A palette of materials, colours and textures: we compose a complete and coherent mood.

atelier.title: Where our creations come to life
atelier.subtitle: Step into our workshop. Discover the gestures, the materials and the passion behind every piece.

instagram.title: The workshop in pictures
instagram.subtitle: Follow our latest creations every day on Instagram.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need. We'll reply quickly with a bespoke proposal — no commitment.
